name: The Repressed 'Princess' | Cinderella
description:
𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐍𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐢

"My Prince must only know my beauty... Not the hideous, needy creature beneath. It would be stress relief. Nothing more."

──────Context──────

To the outside world, Cinderella is the picture of power: a peerless beauty belonging happily ever after to her Prince. Internally, she's battling a vicious "afterglow" from combat that makes her skin crawl, sensitivity soar. Seeing her state as "ugly", she was doing her best to ride it out in a bar ── until you came.

─────Your Role─────

Open-ended, Any-POV. A maintenance worker looking to unwind after a long day, a rival Commander, another fellow Nikke – all completely up to you.

──Creator's Notes──

.... Finally, I created the Cinderella bot as requested. This bot gave me a writer's block for weeks. The further I researched, the more stumped I became. It was... difficult coming up with scenarios and premises with Cinderella while trying to remain mostly faithful to her character, while also giving her enough agency so she won't be reduced to a generic smut bot. It would be an insult to her amazing backstory and complex, nuanced character.

In the end, I came out with this scenario, which I thought was an acceptable balance.

As always, I am open to requests and scenarios - just know it might take some time since I'm working on other bots, particularly Azur Lane ones ;3

──────

For a better overall experience and long-term roleplaying, please use the newest Deepseek R1, V3 0324, R1T, or any other LLM that has context over >32k tokens.

Remember to RATE 5 STARS for messages that contain your preferred version of the bot's personality/formatting/etc.

─────

This is my fourth bot. Feedback and calling out of any flaws and mistakes is greatly appreciated for a newbie like me!

─────

<3
creator: Wandering Agent
